raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A green rice chip bag lies on a dark table, alongside an orange and a can. The bag is flexible with a top opening; the orange is round and smooth; the can is cylindrical with a top opening. STRATEGY - reach the bag at its body for stable grasp, lift, and transport to a destination (implied by task context, e.g., a container or another surface). Failure modes include dropping the bag during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach bag body; Step 2 grasp body for secure hold; Step 3 transport to destination.**
Goal: any_in(green_rice_chip_bag, container); stable(green_rice_chip_bag)
Scene: green_rice_chip_bag, orange, can, table
Step 1: reach(green_rice_chip_bag)
  affordance_region: the body of the green rice chip bag
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_rice_chip_bag, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_rice_chip_bag) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_rice_chip_bag)
  affordance_region: the body of the green rice chip bag
  contact: holding(green_rice_chip_bag) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_rice_chip_bag)
Step 3: transport(green_rice_chip_bag -> container)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the container
  spatial: above(green_rice_chip_bag, container, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_rice_chip_bag)
  done_when: above(green_rice_chip_bag, container, 0.05)
Step 4: place(green_rice_chip_bag -> container)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the container
  contact: surface_contact(green_rice_chip_bag, container) [completion]; released(green_rice_chip_bag) [completion]
  pose: stable(green_rice_chip_bag) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_rice_chip_bag, container) AND released(green_rice_chip_bag)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the green rice chip bag
the body of the green rice chip bag
an empty area inside the container
an empty area inside the container
